text.title: AI-Assisted Coding Protocol for Qualitative Data Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Mid-run codebook tweaks; final kappa unreproducible.
antipattern.fix: Freeze codebook per run; bump semver on changes; rerun coding from start.

antipattern.symptom: AI codes 200 segments; reviewer rejects 40% on spot-check.
antipattern.fix: Require human reconciliation on disagreements + 10% sample kappa check.

antipattern.symptom: Reviewer asks 'who coded this'; team cannot answer.
antipattern.root-cause: Coding output missing coder + codebook_version + timestamp.
antipattern.fix: Add audit fields to every coded segment record.
